name: Solar

traits.name: Resistances
traits.text: Acid, Bludgeoning, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Piercing, Slashing, Thunder

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Necrotic, Poison; Charmed, Exhaustion, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Unconscious

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the specter has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

text:
# Solar

*Medium Undead, Chaotic Evil*

### Actions

**Life Drain.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.
